zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan於1231年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，他的父親Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan31歲，母親Isabel de Comyn27歲。他於1254年與Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan在蘇格蘭雷福福爾伊斯威特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1297年在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan于1231年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可时，他的父亲Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan31岁，母亲Isabel de Comyn27岁。他于1254年与Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan在苏格兰雷福福爾伊斯威特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1297年在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Mure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French muer ‘mewer’, i.e. someone who tended to hawks in the cages in which they were kept while moulting. Compare Mew .

variants.name: Mura
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akio, Hideo, Masao, Nanako, Tsutomu, Yoshi.  French Alphonse, Amie, Henri.
German: altered form of some similar (like-sounding) German or perhaps French surname. It is also common in France (Alsace), where it was first recorded in the form Morrau, later Murra(w).
Italian (southern Sardinia): topographic name or nickname from Sardinian mura ‘mulberry’ or ‘blackberry’.

variants.name: Muir
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived on a moor, from Older Scots muir ‘moor’ (an expanse of bare, wild upland country). There has been some confusion with Mure .

variants.name: Morea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Saverio, Domenic, Ferdinando, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Cesar, Elvira, Jesus, Mauricio.

Italian (Apulia): from the personal name Morea, originally a habitational name from Morea, the medieval name of the Greek region of Peloponnese, named as the land of mulberry trees, from mōrea ‘mulberry’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Morea, in Badajoz, Navarre, and Lleida provinces.

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan was born in 1231, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan, was 31 and his mother, Isabel de Comyn, was 27. He married Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan in 1254, in Eastwood, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1297, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan est né en 1231, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Comyn, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan en 1254, à Eastwood, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1297, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan 1231 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan 31 und seine Mutter Isabel de Comyn 27. Er hat 1254 in Eastwood, Renfrewshire, Scotland Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1297 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan è nato il nel 1231 nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Comyn, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan nel 1254, nel Eastwood, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1297, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallanが1231年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた時，父Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallanは31歳，母Isabel de Comynは27歳であった。1254年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエアストウッドでLady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1297年に故郷で66歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan(이)가 1231년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Comyn(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1254년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 이스트우드에서 Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan nasceu em 1231, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Comyn, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan em 1254, em Eastwood, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1297, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan родился в 1231 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Comyn, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan в 1254 г. в местности эаствуд, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1297 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan nació en 1231, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabel de Comyn, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan en 1254, en Eastwood, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1297, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.
